# Copilot Instructions

Context Kernel location: .ai/

Read these files in order before any task:

1. .ai/AGENTS.md — regras operacionais
2. .ai/SYSTEM.md — proposito e arquitetura
3. .ai/CODEBASE_MAP.md — mapa do codigo
4. .ai/CONTEXT_SURFACES.md — superficies de impacto

Workspace operacional: .ws-dev/
